category_sources: Official Splint homepage describes it as a tool for statically checking C programs for security vulnerabilities and coding mistakes.
source_facts.description says Splint is Secure Programming Lint.
display_name_sources: Official Splint homepage uses the Splint name.
source_facts.name is splint and source_facts.homepage is the official Splint site.
docs_sources: Official Splint website provides a dedicated manual section.
Official Splint website provides manual.pdf and source installation instructions.
repo_sources: Official Splint homepage lists source code as https://github.com/splintchecker/splint.
Official Splint source installation page instructs users to clone https://github.com/splintchecker/splint.
tags_sources: Official Splint homepage says it statically checks C programs for security vulnerabilities and coding mistakes.
source_facts.description expands to Secure Programming Lint.
